use_cases: Indicate loading states during async operations like data fetching
Display while waiting for API responses
Provide visual feedback during page transitions
ai_summary: A lightweight, customizable SVG loading spinner component with configurable size variants (xs to xl) and color variants (default, primary, secondary, muted). Built with class-variance-authority for Tailwind CSS integration, supporting standard accessibility attributes like role='status' and aria-label. The spinner uses a smooth CSS animation and is optimized for both SSR and client-side hydration.
